cases.name: publication_mismatch
cases.reason: A restarted or lagging peer must reject a publication diff whose base UUID does not match the cached cluster-state before acknowledging it.

cases.name: routing_hole
cases.reason: Mixed-cluster routing must fail closed when reroute planning cannot find a started shard copy.

cases.name: stale_replica
cases.reason: Replica application must reject stale sequence numbers before partial replication or ownership drift can occur.
